nasb.text: So the people came to Moses and said, “We have sinned, because we have spoken against the Lord and you; intercede with the Lord, that He may remove the serpents from us.” And Moses interceded for the people.

esv.text: And the people came to Moses and said, “We have sinned, for we have spoken against the Lord and against you. Pray to the Lord, that he take away the serpents from us.” So Moses prayed for the people.

cnv.text: 人民來見摩西，說：“我們有罪了，因為我們出惡言攻擊耶和華和你；求你向耶和華禱告，叫這些蛇離開我們。”於是摩西為眾人禱告。

ccb.text: 他们来找摩西，说：“我们埋怨耶和华和你，犯了罪，求你向耶和华祷告，好叫这些蛇离开我们。”摩西就为他们祷告。
